analytics.title: Comparing Powerwise (PWR) and the NCAA Power Index (NPI): Advising the NCAA Men's Division I Lacrosse Committee
analytics.wce_line: The study concludes that Powerwise (PWR) outperforms the NCAA Power Index (NPI) for ranking team sports with larger margins of victory, such as basketball.

analytics.title: STAMP: A shot-type-aware areal multilevel Poisson model for league-wide comparison of basketball shot charts
analytics.wce_line: The STAMP model provides a unified framework to compare shot-type-specific tendencies across teams in basketball, offering better predictive performance than simpler models.

analytics.title: The Value of Graph-based Encoding in NBA Salary Prediction
